summary: Capture the exact native MCP source precondition instead of synthetically reproducing a source previously created by the hosted AI journey.

decisions.topic: MCP source independence from hosted AI
decisions.decision: Supersede D-0456's synthetic agentSource setup. Capture the exact editor source at MCP default-deny entry, retain it in bounded harness memory, require denial not to change it, and compare the review UI against that exact local source and an exact proposal without a terminal newline before approval.
decisions.rationale: The native-only run proved WebDriver could not reliably type the trailing-newline agentSource fixture while the AI rail was active. The MCP acceptance criterion does not require a particular prior AI-generated source; it requires safe default denial, explicit review, and exact approved mutation. Capturing the real source removes cross-gate coupling and uses the same no-terminal-newline proposal shape already passed by the earlier Appendix B packaged MCP walkthrough.

testEvidence.criterion: Native-only mode must reach MCP without starting packaged AI or synthetically rewriting CodeMirror, and the runner must bind the review oracle to the captured exact source.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused M4 walkthrough, verifier, and packaged runner contract suites.

red.command: Exact clean packaged Windows Sandbox run bound to commit 9e0cd249739db06ca387018b8c682c20c2ac4fb1 and tree 7b840c26d85a4fe2af9039493e0abb79bab823f7
red.outcome: RUNTIME RED: the synthetic pre-MCP agentSource entry timed out in CodeMirror before MCP began. Exact Sandbox cleanup passed.

green.outcome: GREEN: 75/75 tests passed. Native-only mode reaches MCP with initialSource unchanged and no AI mock; static runner contracts bind the exact review comparison to m4McpLocalSource captured before the denied write.

nearMisses.sought: Exact clean native-only packaged M4 walkthrough with a synthetic agentSource precondition
nearMisses.confirmation: The retained error occurred during fixture entry before MCP, not in product MCP behavior; all earlier native events and exact cleanup passed.

questions: No owner decision is required; AC-11.a does not require MCP to inherit a particular AI-generated source.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
